notes: Wix-built site (~980 KB). Events are server-rendered into a Wix Events widget at lines 2079-2087 inside <div id="wix-events-widget" data-hook="EVENTS_ROOT_NODE">. Each event is an <li data-hook="event-list-item"> with title in <span data-hook="ev-list-item-title"> and full date in <div data-hook="date">. Page also serializes additional events as warmupData JSON later in the document (line ~2305) — those events DO appear in the page's data layer (each has data-hook="ev-list-item-title", image alt tag, description, and warmupData entry with start/end times) but were missed by the initial GT-curation pass that focused on the visible widget. CORRECTED during Phase 5.1 re-run: added 3 events (Celebration Of Dance, Corey B, An Evening With Clare Bowen And Jonathan Jackson) confirmed real via Wix widget markers + warmupData. Step By Step shows a "Multiple Dates" ribbon indicating recurrence. starts_at/date_evidence for the 3 added events left null — their dates exist in warmupData but are interleaved with template strings (Thank you / Sorry You Can't Make It / Thanks!) in a non-trivial pairing; titles are sufficient for the title-based matcher. All times America/New_York; late-May/early-June 2026 falls in EDT (UTC-04:00).
